title: ColorNormal
text: ColorNormal Controls the color value used as the default for normal color objects. ColorNormal = IndexColor Default value 56 File section [upi] Arguments IndexColor —Uniface index color Table 1. Default Uniface Color Codes Color Foreground Color Background Color System default 0 0 Blue 8 1 Green 16 2 Cyan 24 3 Red 32 4 Purple 40 5 Yellow 48 6 White - 7 Black 56 - Related Links Uniface Index Colors Uniface index colors are combinations of foreground an background colors that are identified by a color code, a number from 0 to 63.
